text: July 2009
author: @AidenSamuel-kw8sf

text: Could you please elaborate and explain your comment? My video was posten on december 2008, as the description shows.
author: @eduardorpg64

text:
It took me 16 years to realize... why the heck did King Harkanian conquer Hyrule if he's already its King?

Then again this is a continuity where the objective is using toasters to seal away birds so idk
author: @jbh2705

text:
The reason why the King conquered Hyrule despite being King of Hyrule was that my English back then wasn't very good. I thought "conquer" meant "starting a dictatorship."

So, by "the king conquered Hyrule" I meant "King Harkinian started a dictatorship in Hyrule and enslaved his own people. He violated the rights of his own people. He changed from being a good king to being a cruel tyrant."

Sorry for the confusion. I think there are some other people that have commented about that here in the comment section.
author: @eduardorpg64

text: @eduardorpg64  Ah I see, thank you for the clarification!
author: @jbh2705

text: You're welcome! Thank you for your comment! I appreciate the fact that you commented on a 16-year-old video of mine.

author: @legobatman-migthenormie

text:
I remember repeatedly rewatching this series when I was just 10. It was easily my favorite YTP of all. I'm extremely glad to see it's still up, since a lot of old YTPs have their original uploads deleted.

I randomly remembered this one's existence when the "Nope. I'm going to join Ganon" gag just popped in my head out of nowhere and I started laughing to myself like a crazy person.
author: @sblankg

text:
Glad that you liked it a lot! Thanks for watching!

And yup: Plenty of Youtube Poops have disappeared over time. I had some YTPs from other people downloaded from some time ago in my computer, and I wanted to look them up in Youtube. Unfortunately, I can't find them anywhere on Youtube (like "Morshu sings NIN, Rick Astley, Zelda, and Castlevania" or something like that).

I really appreciate your comment!

text: This youtube poop withstood the test of time. I guess the secret to making a good youtube poop is making it something other than JUST endless memes and funny editing techniques
author: @screechingtoad2683

text:
Thank you! I wanted to tell a story with Dinner Heroes, so that's why I added more than just memes and funny editing skills. 

Apparently, YTPs were supposed to be videos that should annoy people. That's what people on the official YTP/YouChew Poop forums said. They hated funny YTPs and "flash poops" (YTPs with flashy special effects.) In fact, people on those forums posted my video there, and said that my Dinner Heroes sucked and it was thrash, precisely because it wasn't an annoying video.

I never liked YTPs that were supposed to annoy the viewer. So, I decided to tell a story with Dinner Heroes.

text: I've seen this ytp since I was like 14. Years have passed and only around a month ago, I remembered this and tried to look for it. But when I did, I couldn't find it. My heart was sadden by the reality that this might have been taken down. But in a twist of events, while searching for other ytps, I found all three of these videos. I almost cried from nostalgia. Now that I'm 18, I still laugh at this and will forever love this ytp to the bottom of my heart.

text:
The reason you couldn't find it was that I had set almost all of my videos to private a few years ago since I was a bit concerned about my privacy. However, I changed my mind, and I made pretty much all of my videos public again.

Also, I'm glad that you liked it! :)

text: Wait! Didn't the king and Zelda conquered Hyrule already?
author: @swineliasthegamer7686

text:
That was a misinterpretation from my part for the word "conquer". I had to explain it better in "Dinner Heroes 2: Part 1".

By "conquer Hyrule", I meant that the king started a tyranny and started trample and violate everyone's human rights in Hyrule. Yes, he was already the King of Hyrule. However, he used to be a fair king,  and he used to respect everyone's human rights.

However, he became power hungry, and wanted to steal everything from his people, and destroy everyone who opposed him.

And Zelda just wanted to be with her father, regardless of how evil his intentions were.

That's what I meant by "the king of Hyrule conquered Hyrule". English is not my native language.

author: @toastersstoast

text:
Check my first 2 Youtube Poops: my editing and story telling skills weren't anywhere as good as when I made this video. Heck, making my first 2 YTPs was in and by itself hard. I had to check tutorials on how to use Windows Movie Maker.

My point being: you could if you put the effort into it. It will be hard. Things may not come out as the original vision that was in your mind at first. But the satsifaction that you will feel in the end for editing a video (or doing any other kind of project) will be worth it.

So, just try! If you have a project idea (YTP, or whatever,) go and make it!

author: @eduardorpg64

text:
The idea came to me in the final months of 2007 (like most of my upcoming videos), but making the video lasted around 9 days (I was on holidays). 

BTW the idea of the sequel of this (yeah, this has a sequel) came to me on 2007 too. In that year, I had a lot of ideas while watching videos, but I couldn't make them since I was a movie maker user and using adobe premiere a little
